project_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Matches `projects.id`; scopes RLS + join key to `project_entry_states`.

G1_decisions_needed.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.intake-tier-0 | G1: Do you need help making system design decisions? YES fires the M4 decision-network pipeline.

G2_prd_needed.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.intake-tier-0 | G2: Do you want spec-tight PRD documentation? YES fires the synthesizer + export pipeline.

pipeline_route.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Derived from G1×G2; enforced by the refine on the outer schema.

D0_product_archetype.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.tier-1 | D0: What are you building? Auto-infers D5/D6/D7/D12 for ~80% of cases.

D4_dau_band.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.tier-1 | D4: target (new/exploring) or current (existing) DAU band.

D6_industry.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.tier-1 | D6: industry — auto-infers compliance posture + SLA defaults + data sensitivity.

D8_budget_band.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.tier-1 | D8: monthly infra budget band — prunes expensive alternatives.

D7_transaction_pattern.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.tier-1 | D7: dominant transaction shape — reshapes decision-network axis weighting.

D1_team_size.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Inferred team size band (from company_signals.employee_count_band OR D8 proxy).

D3_project_type.description: x-ui-surface=internal | greenfield / brownfield / hybrid — directly derived from `project_entry.entry_pattern`.

D9_geo.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Geographic distribution hint (single-region default from signup_geo IP).

D10_sla_tier.description: x-ui-surface=internal | SLA tier default from D5 + D6; only surfaced at M4 if in conflict with user input.

D12_data_sensitivity.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Data-sensitivity class from D0 + D6 industry defaults.

inferred_value.description: x-ui-surface=internal | The value we landed on (stringified for cross-type audit parity).

confidence.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Confidence in [0,1]. Values <0.60 SHOULD have surfaced a Tier-2 confirm prompt per §5.0.3.

sources.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Source trail, e.g. ["D0=E-Commerce","user_profile.industry=retail"]. At least one source required.

inference_audit.description: x-ui-surface=internal | One row per Tier-2 inference; the refine below enforces 1:1 coverage with `inferred.*`.

decision_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal | M4 decision node id the pruning applies to.

removed_alternatives.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Alternatives removed from this decision node’s option set pre-scoring.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Plain-language reason (e.g. "D8=<$100 rules out dedicated Aurora cluster").

pruning_set.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Pre-M4 alternative pruning entries. Empty is permitted (no pruning applied).

computed_constants.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Pre-computed numeric/string constants keyed by identifier. Populated by the intake agent from Tier-1/2 answers (e.g. {peakRpsFromDau: 120, slaTier: "99.9"}).

intake_duration_seconds.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Wall-clock intake duration. Target <120s per §5.0.3 design principle.
